mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( EMAIL, USER_NO, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, GENDER, BIRTH_DATE, POSTCODE, ADDRESS, DETAILADDRESS, EXTRAADDRESS, REG_DATE, LAST_PW_DATE, STATUS, IDLE, SUSPENDED, CASH_BALANCE, MANNER_TEMP, PROFILE_IMG ) VALUES ( #{email}, SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{password}, #{userName}, #{nickname}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailaddress}, #{extraaddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{profileImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT EMAIL AS email, USER_NO AS userNo, PASSWORD AS password, USER_NAME AS userName, PHONE AS phone, GENDER AS gender, BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, NICKNAME AS nickname, ADDRESS AS address, PROFILE_IMG AS profileImg, IDLE AS idle, MANNER_TEMP AS mannerTemp FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND STATUS = 1
SELECT email FROM member WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET password = #{password}, LAST_PW_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_DORMANT ( EMAIL, DORMANT_DATE, PHONE, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER, USER_NAME, NICKNAME, ORIGINAL_REG_DATE, CASH_BALANCE, LAST_LOGIN_DATE ) SELECT EMAIL, SYSDATE, PHONE, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER, USER_NAME, NICKNAME, REG_DATE, CASH_BALANCE, LAST_LOGIN_DATE FROM MEMBER WHERE IDLE = 0 AND STATUS = 1 AND ( (LAST_LOGIN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND LAST_LOGIN_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)) OR (LAST_LOGIN_DATE IS NULL AND REG_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)) ) AND EMAIL NOT IN (SELECT EMAIL FROM USER_DORMANT)
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET IDLE = 1 WHERE IDLE = 0 AND STATUS = 1 AND ( (LAST_LOGIN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND LAST_LOGIN_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)) OR (LAST_LOGIN_DATE IS NULL AND REG_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE PHONE = #{phone} AND IDLE = 1
SELECT AUTHORITY FROM AUTHORITIES WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
SELECT RT_VALUE FROM TBL_REFRESHTOKEN WHERE EMAIL = #{email}

SELECT EMAIL AS email, USER_NO AS userNo, PASSWORD AS password, USER_NAME AS userName, PHONE AS phone, NICKNAME AS nickname, ADDRESS AS address, PROFILE_IMG AS profileImg, IDLE AS idle, MANNER_TEMP AS mannerTemp, SOCIAL_TYPE AS socialType FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( EMAIL, USER_NO, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, NICKNAME, POSTCODE, ADDRESS, DETAILADDRESS, REG_DATE, LAST_PW_DATE, STATUS, IDLE, SUSPENDED, CASH_BALANCE, MANNER_TEMP, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID ) VALUES ( #{email}, SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{password}, #{userName}, #{nickname}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailaddress}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{socialType}, #{socialId} )
INSERT INTO AUTHORITIES (AUTH_NO, EMAIL, AUTHORITY) VALUES (SEQ_AUTHORITIES_NO.NEXTVAL, #{email}, 'ROLE_USER')
